message:
feat(monitor): add burst detection to EWMA rate estimator

Implement comprehensive burst detection for disk I/O workload spikes:

- Add BurstState struct reporting burst probability, median rate, duration,
  and calibration status from historical rate analysis
- Introduce rate_history ring buffer (200-sample default) to track
  instantaneous rates for pattern detection
- Improve alpha damping: nonlinear formula (1/(1+2*burstiness)) to damp
  EWMA response during high-variance bursts instead of linear multiplier
- Add compute_burst_state(): detects consecutive samples >3x median,
  derives burst probability from deviation magnitude and duration,
  requires 30+ samples for calibration confidence
- Add with_history_cap() constructor for testability
- Integrate BurstState into RateEstimate output
- Comprehensive test validating burst dampening behavior

Enables storage-ballast to distinguish transient workload spikes from
sustained I/O pressure, improving ballast fill/drain policy decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
